finding: The prior frontend workflow answer described a generic Codex-led implementation loop and omitted the EvCode specialist-routing layer, so it failed to mention Gemini even though EvCode policy routes frontend-visual work to Gemini advisory mode.

evidence.status_surface: evcode status --json shows assistants [codex, claude, gemini] and advisory governance

gemini_should_be_mentioned_when: mixed_ui with strong visual evidence or aesthetics focus
claude_should_be_mentioned_when: ambiguous UX or overall project design
why_it_may_have_been_omitted: the answer was framed as generic coding workflow rather than EvCode governed routing workflow
current local live provider setup is not active, so the answer may have stayed conservative
